descriptions.description: The 15ml Elegant roll-on bottle brings a tapered shoulder and refined neck to sample sizes. Its 13-415 thread accepts metal or plastic roller balls for perfume oil and essential oil. A favorite for luxury fragrance and aromatherapy sampling.
The 15ml Elegant bottle with a 13-415 neck built for fine mist sprayers. Perfume and fragrance mist brands choose this shape for its elegant profile. A compact spray format for discovery sets.
The 15ml Elegant bottle with a 13-415 neck. Versatile for roll-on, spray, or cap closures. The tapered shoulder gives a premium feel at sample sizes.

A one-ounce Elegant bottle with a 15-415 neck built for fine mist sprayers. Perfume and fragrance mist brands choose this shape for its elegant profile. The tapered shoulder gives a premium feel at sample and travel sizes.
A one-ounce Elegant bottle with a 15-415 neck. Versatile for spray or cap closures. The tapered silhouette stands out on displays.

The 60ml Elegant bottle with an 18-415 neck pairs with vintage bulb sprayers. Perfume and cologne brands use this capacity for a classic, decorative look. The tapered silhouette stands out on vanity and retail displays.
The 60ml Elegant bottle with an 18-415 neck for vintage bulb sprayers with tassel. A distinctive format for gift and luxury fragrance packaging.
The 60ml Elegant bottle with an 18-415 neck built for fine mist sprayers. Eau de toilette and fragrance mist brands choose this for travel and gift sizes. The tapered shoulder gives a premium feel.

The 60ml Elegant dropper bottle with an 18-415 neck. Essential oils, perfume oils, beard oil, and therapeutic blends dispense precisely. The tapered silhouette suits aromatherapy and fragrance brands.
The 60ml Elegant reducer bottle with an 18-415 neck. Splash-on cologne and open-mouth formats for fragrance and aftershave. A classic pour-over application.
The 60ml Elegant bottle with an 18-415 neck for lotion pumps. Serums and light creams dispense cleanly. Skincare brands use this for travel and trial sizes.
The 60ml Elegant bottle with an 18-415 neck. Pairs with spray, dropper, reducer, or vintage bulb sprayers.

A three-ounce Elegant bottle with an 18-415 neck ready for lotion pumps. Body lotion, hand cream, and face cream brands choose this shape for a premium feel. Frosted glass options add a soft, luxury aesthetic.
A three-ounce Elegant reducer bottle with an 18-415 neck. Splash-on cologne and concentrated fragrance formats. The tapered silhouette suits luxury positioning.
A three-ounce Elegant bottle with an 18-415 neck for fine mist sprayers. Full-size perfume and body mist formats. The tapered shoulder stands out on retail displays.
A three-ounce Elegant bottle with an 18-415 neck for vintage bulb sprayers. Perfume and cologne brands use this for a decorative, full-size format.
A three-ounce Elegant bottle with an 18-415 neck for vintage bulb sprayers with tassel. A distinctive format for gift and luxury fragrance packaging.
A three-ounce Elegant bottle with an 18-415 neck. Ready for lotion pumps, spray, or vintage bulb sprayers.
